
```{python}
import statsmodels.api as sm
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

df = pd.read_csv("../data/model_df.csv")
```

```{python}
print(df["outcome"].value_counts().sort_index())
print(pd.crosstab(
    [df["powerplay"], df["end_grp"], df["score_diff_grp"]],
    df["outcome"]
))
```
```{python}


df = df.dropna(
    subset=[
        
        "h_offensive_shots",
        "h_classified_shots",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

df["h_defensive_shots"] = (
    df["h_classified_shots"] - df["h_offensive_shots"]
)


style_glm = smf.glm(
    """
    h_offensive_shots + h_defensive_shots ~ powerplay
                                           + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))
                                           + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                                           + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))
                                           +powerplay:C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                                           + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=df,
    family=sm.families.Binomial()
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": df["match_id"]}
)

print(style_glm.summary())

```

```{python}
df = df.dropna(
    subset=[
        "outcome",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

# make sure baseline category is "0"
df["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    df["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"],
    ordered=False
)

# statsmodels MNLogit wants numeric codes
df["outcome_code"] = df["outcome"].cat.codes

mnlogit_result = smf.mnlogit(
    """
    outcome_code ~ powerplay
                 + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))
                 + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                 + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))
                 + powerplay:C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                 + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=df
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": df["match_id"]},
    maxiter=200
)

print(mnlogit_result.summary())
```

```{python}

for col in ["h_before", "h_after", "powerplay"]:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce")

df["h_points_scored"] = df["h_after"] - df["h_before"]

risk_obs = (
    df.dropna(subset=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "h_points_scored"])
    .groupby(["powerplay", "end_grp", "score_diff_grp"], as_index=False, observed=False)
    .agg(
        n=("h_points_scored", "size"),
        mean_points=("h_points_scored", "mean"),
        sd_points=("h_points_scored", "std"),
        p0=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 0).mean()),
        p1=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 1).mean()),
        p2plus=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s >= 2).mean())
    )
)

print(risk_obs.round(3))
```

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from matplotlib.patches import Patch

# --- Global Style Configuration ---
sns.set_theme(style="white")

FONT_SIZE = 14 
C_STD, C_PP = "#bdc3c7", "#1a2a6c"

plt.rcParams.update({
    'figure.dpi': 300,
    'font.family': 'sans-serif',
    'font.size': FONT_SIZE,
    'axes.labelsize': FONT_SIZE,
    'axes.titlesize': FONT_SIZE,
    'xtick.labelsize': FONT_SIZE,
    'ytick.labelsize': FONT_SIZE,
    'legend.fontsize': FONT_SIZE,
    'legend.title_fontsize': FONT_SIZE,
    'patch.edgecolor': 'black',
    'figure.autolayout': True  
})

def get_pred_grid():
    states = [(pp, sd, eg) for eg in ["<=6", ">=7"] 
              for sd in ["leading", "tied", "trailing"] for pp in [0, 1]]
    return pd.DataFrame(states, columns=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp"]).assign(strength_diff_z=0)

# 1. USAGE (Deployment Rates)
def plot_usage(df):
    total = df.groupby(["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"], observed=False).size().reset_index(name="N")
    pp = df[df["powerplay"] == 1].groupby(["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"], observed=False).size().reset_index(name="n")
    
    # MINIMAL FIX: Use how="left" and fillna(0) to keep 0% deployment states
    df_u = pd.merge(total, pp, on=["score_diff_grp", "end_grp"], how="left")
    df_u["n"] = df_u["n"].fillna(0)
    df_u["rate"] = (df_u["n"] / df_u["N"]) * 100

    df_u['score_diff_grp'] = pd.Categorical(df_u['score_diff_grp'], categories=["trailing","tied","leading"], ordered=True)
    df_u['end_grp'] = pd.Categorical(df_u['end_grp'], categories=["<=6", ">=7"], ordered=True)
    df_u = df_u.sort_values(['end_grp', 'score_diff_grp'])

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4)) 
    
    sns.barplot(data=df_u, x="score_diff_grp", y="rate", hue="end_grp", 
                palette="viridis", order=["trailing", "tied", "leading"], ax=ax)
    
    for p, n, r in zip(ax.patches, df_u["n"], df_u["rate"]):
        h = p.get_height()
        if h > 0:
            ax.text(p.get_x()+p.get_width()/2, h+1.5, f'{r:.1f}%', ha='center', weight='bold')
            ax.text(p.get_x()+p.get_width()/2, h+0.2, f'n={int(n)}', ha='center', va='top',
                    bbox=dict(facecolor='white', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='none', pad=1))

    ax.set_ylabel("Deployment Rate (%)")
    ax.set_xlabel("Score Difference")
    ax.set_ylim(0, df_u.rate.max()+15)
    
    colors = sns.color_palette("viridis", 2)
    handles = [Patch(facecolor=colors[0], label='Ends 1-6'), Patch(facecolor=colors[1], label='Ends 7+')]
    ax.legend(handles=handles, title="Game Phase", loc="upper left", frameon=True)
    
    sns.despine()
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/usage.pdf", bbox_inches='tight',facecolor='white')

# 2. STRATEGY (Offensive Rate)
def plot_strategy(model):
    grid = get_pred_grid()
    
    # 1. Fetch predictions AND Confidence Intervals
    pred_summary = model.get_prediction(grid).summary_frame()
    grid["rate"] = pred_summary["mean"] * 100
    grid["ci_lower"] = pred_summary["mean_ci_lower"] * 100
    grid["ci_upper"] = pred_summary["mean_ci_upper"] * 100
    
    grid["Type"] = grid.powerplay.map({0: 'Standard', 1: 'Power Play'})
    
    # Set categorical orders to ensure data aligns perfectly with Seaborn's drawing order
    grid['score_diff_grp'] = pd.Categorical(grid['score_diff_grp'], categories=["trailing", "tied", "leading"], ordered=True)
    
    g = sns.catplot(data=grid, x="score_diff_grp", y="rate", hue="Type", col="end_grp", 
                    kind="bar", palette=[C_STD, C_PP], height=5, aspect=1.5, 
                    order=["trailing", "tied", "leading"],
                    hue_order=["Standard", "Power Play"]) # Enforce hue draw order
    
    g.set_axis_labels("Score Difference", "Predicted Offensive Rate (%)").set_titles("End {col_name}")
    g._legend.remove()
    
    # 2. Draw Error Bars precisely over the generated patches
    for ax, end_val in zip(g.axes.flat, ["<=6", ">=7"]):
        # Sort exactly how Seaborn draws: by Hue (Standard->PP), then by X-axis
        sub_df = grid[grid["end_grp"] == end_val].sort_values(["powerplay", "score_diff_grp"])
        
        # Matplotlib errorbar expects relative distances from the mean
        err_down = sub_df["rate"] - sub_df["ci_lower"]
        err_up = sub_df["ci_upper"] - sub_df["rate"]
        
        for i, p in enumerate(ax.patches):
            x = p.get_x() + p.get_width() / 2
            y = p.get_height()
            
            if y > 0: # Skip empty bars
                ax.errorbar(
                    x, y, 
                    yerr=[[err_down.iloc[i]], [err_up.iloc[i]]], 
                    color='black', capsize=3, fmt='none', lw=1.2
                )
    
    handles = [Patch(facecolor=C_STD, label='Standard'), Patch(facecolor=C_PP, label='Power Play')]
    g.axes[0,1].legend(handles=handles, loc='upper right', title="End Type",bbox_to_anchor=(1, 1.05),frameon=True)
    
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/strategy.pdf", bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='white')
# 3. OUTCOMES (Probabilities)


# --- Prediction grid for Power Play effect ---
def get_pred_grid_pp():
    states = [(pp, sd, eg) for pp in [0, 1]  # Standard vs Power Play
              for sd in ["trailing", "tied", "leading"]
              for eg in ["<=6", ">=7"]]
    return pd.DataFrame(states, columns=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp"]).assign(strength_diff_z=0)

def plot_outcomes(df, mnlogit_result):
    grid = get_pred_grid_pp()
    
    # 1. Minimal Hack: Fit a temporary binary GLM for the '2+' category
    # This gives us access to .get_prediction().summary_frame()
    df_temp = df.copy()
    df_temp["is_2plus"] = (df_temp["outcome"] == "2+").astype(int)
    
    proxy_model = smf.glm(
        "is_2plus ~ powerplay * (C(score_diff_grp, Treatment('trailing')) + C(end_grp, Treatment('<=6'))) + strength_diff_z",
        data=df_temp,
        family=sm.families.Binomial()
    ).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": df_temp["match_id"]}) 

    # 2. Get Predictions and CIs
    pred_summary = proxy_model.get_prediction(grid).summary_frame()
    grid["Pred_Prob"] = pred_summary["mean"]
    grid["ci_lower"] = pred_summary["mean_ci_lower"]
    grid["ci_upper"] = pred_summary["mean_ci_upper"]
    
    grid["Type"] = grid.powerplay.map({0: "Standard", 1: "Power Play"})
    grid['score_diff_grp'] = pd.Categorical(grid['score_diff_grp'], categories=["trailing", "tied", "leading"], ordered=True)

    # 3. Plot
    g = sns.catplot(data=grid, x="score_diff_grp", y="Pred_Prob", hue="Type", col="end_grp",
                    kind="bar", palette=[C_STD, C_PP], height=5, aspect=1.3,
                    order=["trailing", "tied", "leading"], hue_order=["Standard", "Power Play"])
    
    g.set_axis_labels("Score Difference", "Predicted Probability of 2+ Points").set_titles("End {col_name}")
    g._legend.remove()

    # 4. Overlay Error Bars
    for ax, end_val in zip(g.axes.flat, ["<=6", ">=7"]):
        sub_df = grid[grid["end_grp"] == end_val].sort_values(["powerplay", "score_diff_grp"])
        
        err_down = sub_df["Pred_Prob"] - sub_df["ci_lower"]
        err_up = sub_df["ci_upper"] - sub_df["Pred_Prob"]
        
        for i, p in enumerate(ax.patches):
            x = p.get_x() + p.get_width() / 2
            y = p.get_height()
            if y > 0:
                ax.errorbar(x, y, yerr=[[err_down.iloc[i]], [err_up.iloc[i]]], 
                            color='black', capsize=3, fmt='none', lw=1.2)

    ax = g.axes[0, 1]
    ax.legend(title="Power Play", loc='upper right', frameon=True,bbox_to_anchor=(1, 1.06))
    plt.savefig("../manuscript/figures/outcomes.pdf", bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='white')




# --- Run ---
plt.close('all')
plot_usage(df)
plot_strategy(style_glm)
plot_outcomes(df,mnlogit_result)
```




```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 1. Update this dictionary to match your EXACT statsmodels output names
# I've used the names from your previous GLM/MNLogit code blocks
clean_index = {
    "C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))[T.leading]": "Score: Leading",
    "C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))[T.tied]": "Score: Tied",
    "C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))[T.>=7]": "End >= 7 (Late Game)",
    "powerplay": "Power Play (PP)",
    "powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))[T.leading]": "PP × Leading",
    "powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='trailing'))[T.tied]": "PP × Tied",
    "powerplay:C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))[T.>=7]": "PP × End >= 7",
    "strength_diff_z": "Team Strength (Z)"
}

def get_stars(p):
    if p < 0.01: return "***"
    if p < 0.05: return "**"
    if p < 0.1: return "*"
    return ""

rows = []
# Filter out Intercept and any variables not in our clean list
vars_to_report = [v for v in mnlogit_result.params.index if v in clean_index]

for var in vars_to_report:
    row_data = {"Predictor": clean_index.get(var, var)}
    
    for col in mnlogit_result.params.columns:
        # Use descriptive column headers for the poster
        outcome_label = "Prob(1 Pt)" if col == 0 else "Prob(2+ Pts)"
        
        coef = mnlogit_result.params.loc[var, col]
        se = mnlogit_result.bse.loc[var, col]
        p = mnlogit_result.pvalues.loc[var, col]
        
        rrr = np.exp(coef)
        lower = np.exp(coef - 1.96 * se)
        upper = np.exp(coef + 1.96 * se)
        
        # Format: 1.66*** [1.33, 2.09]
        row_data[outcome_label] = f"{rrr:.2f}{get_stars(p)} [{lower:.2f}, {upper:.2f}]"
        
    rows.append(row_data)

# 2. Convert to DataFrame
compact_df = pd.DataFrame(rows)

# 3. Generate Clean LaTeX
# 'lcc' alignment: Left-aligned labels, Centered data
latex_output = compact_df.to_latex(
    index=False,
    caption="Scoring Dynamics: Relative Risk Ratios [95\% CI]",
    column_format="lll", 
    escape=False,
    label="tab:curling_results"
)

print(latex_output)

```

```{python}

```
